categories.name: Emergency & Disaster
examples: fire accident in building, person unconscious needs ambulance, flood rescue needed, gas leak reported, building collapse, violence happening now

categories.name: Roads & Transport
examples: potholes, broken roads, traffic lights not working, bus issues, road accidents due to bad roads

categories.name: Water Supply
examples: no water supply, dirty water, low pressure, pipeline leakage, water tanker not coming

categories.name: Electricity
examples: power cuts, transformer failure, voltage fluctuation, street lights off

categories.name: Sanitation & Waste
examples: garbage not collected, dumping, bad smell, waste burning

categories.name: Drainage & Flooding
examples: blocked drains, waterlogging, flooding after rain, sewage overflow

categories.name: Healthcare
examples: hospital services, ambulance delay, medicine shortage, rude staff

categories.name: Education
examples: school issues, teacher absence, facilities, exam problems

categories.name: Public Safety & Law
examples: theft, harassment, violence, illegal activities, police response delay

categories.name: Government Services
examples: documents, certificates, delays in service, office staff issues

categories.name: Environment
examples: pollution, illegal cutting, lake/river issues, forest damage

categories.name: Housing & Land
examples: land disputes, housing scheme issues, encroachment

categories.name: Other
examples: anything that doesn't match above categories
